arts.ttl: Serie A | Roma v Genoa: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Roma prepare to face Genoa in a crucial Serie A fixture, manager Claudio Ranieri finds himself in an enviable position with an almost fully fit squad at his disposal. The only notable absentee for Friday's encounter is Bryan Cristante, who is in the final stages of recovery from an ankle injury. The post Serie A | Roma v Genoa: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Roma vs Genoa to open matchday 21
arts.sum: Roma have kept four clean sheets in their last six Serie A matches against Genoa, as many as in their previous 14 games against them; furthermore, the Giallorossi have only failed to score once in their last 19 games against the Rossoblu in the competition. Genoa have won 33 matches against Roma in Serie A (D26 L54), only winning more against Lazio (38 wins); however, the Rossoblu have collected only one win in their last 19 matches against the Giallorossi in the competition (D55 L13).

arts.ttl: Roma Secure Pisilli’s Future: From Academy Prospect to First-Team Star
arts.sum: Roma are set to reward Niccolò Pisilli's rapid rise with a lucrative new contract, cementing the 20-year-old midfielder's place in the club's long-term plans. The proposed deal would see Pisilli's annual salary increase from €70,000 to around €500,000, with the contract running until 2029.
